<!--       theme_bw()+ -->
<!--       # facet_wrap(~quintile, scales = "fixed")+ -->
<!--       ggtitle("MT5 ~ SEXF + phenotype_i + (1| patID_eye) + (1|patID)") -->

<!-- ggsave(paste0(MT_modeling_path, "MT5_by_phenos_volcano.png"), MT5_by_phenos_volcano, width = 20, height = 12, dpi = 200) -->

<!-- MT5_by_phenos_volcano_filtered <-ggplot(results_df_filtered , aes(x = Estimate, y = -log10(q_value), color = Term))+ -->
<!--       geom_point(show.legend = FALSE)+ -->
<!--       geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse( q_value <= .05,  Term, NA)), -->
<!--                        size = 4, -->
<!--                        nudge_y = 0.5, -->
<!--                        show.legend = FALSE, -->
<!--                        max.overlaps = 20)+ -->
<!--       geom_abline(slope = 0, intercept = -log10(.05), linetype = 2, color = "red")+ -->
<!--       geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "dashed")+ -->
<!--       theme_bw()+ -->
<!--       # facet_wrap(~quintile, scales = "fixed")+ -->
<!--       ggtitle("MT5 ~ SEXF + phenotype_i + (1| patID_eye) + (1|patID)") -->

<!-- ggsave(paste0(MT_modeling_path, "MT5_by_phenos_volcano_filtered.png"), MT5_by_phenos_volcano_filtered, width = 20, height = 12, dpi = 200) -->

<!-- ``` -->


<!-- ## MT5 rate -->
<!-- ### subset data to scale and model -->
<!-- * filter for the vars with (rows>0) > 30 -->
<!-- ```{r} -->

<!-- # #  variables (rows of value != 0) where MT05_rate present -->
<!-- # m <- d[!is.na(d$MT05_rate),phenotypes] != 0 -->
<!-- #  -->
<!-- # # how many of each var is not 0 -->
<!-- # vars <- m %>% -->
<!-- #   colSums(., na.rm = TRUE) -->
<!-- #  -->
<!-- # # variables with > 30 obs of value>0 -->
<!-- # powered_vars <- vars[vars > 30] %>% names() -->
<!-- #  -->
<!-- # # how many unique months do these have where FA_mean and var available? -->
<!-- # count_unq_months <-  sapply(powered_vars, function(x){ -->
<!-- #                      -->
<!-- #                     # how many unique months where both response variable and var available? -->
<!-- #                     return( d$month[!is.na(d$MT05_rate) & !is.na(d[,x])] %>% -->
<!-- #                              unique() %>% -->
<!-- #                              length() -->
<!-- #                             ) -->
<!-- #                   }) -->
<!-- #  -->
<!-- # # vars with greater than one unique month observed -->
<!-- # MT5_rate_greater_than_one_month <- count_unq_months[count_unq_months>1] %>% -->
<!-- #   names() -->



<!-- # # subset d with vars of interest -->
<!-- # model_df <- d %>% -->
<!-- #   select(month, patID_eye, patID, SEXF, all_of(MT5_rate_greater_than_one_month)) -->
<!-- #  -->
<!-- # # scale vars of interest -->
<!-- # model_df[, MT5_rate_greater_than_one_month] <- scale(model_df[, MT5_rate_greater_than_one_month]) -->


<!-- # subset d with vars of interest -->

<!-- response = "MT05_rate" -->
<!-- # subset d with vars of interest  -->
<!-- model_df <- d %>%  -->
<!--   select(month, patID_eye, patID, SEXF, all_of(c(phenotypes, response))) -->

<!-- # scale vars of interest, minus response: FA2_rate -->
<!-- model_df[, phenotypes[phenotypes!=response] ] <- scale(model_df[, phenotypes[phenotypes!=response] ]) -->


<!-- # # reduce model_df to patient's rate and first_visit phenotype value -->
<!-- # model_df_first <- model_df %>%  -->
<!-- #   arrange(month) %>%   -->
<!-- #   group_by(patID_eye) %>% -->
<!-- #   # summarize(across( -->
<!-- #   #   .cols = !c("patID_eye", "month", "SEXF"),  -->
<!-- #   #   .fns = ~dplyr::first(.), -->
<!-- #   #   .names  = "first_{.col}") -->
<!-- #   #   ) %>% -->
<!-- #   mutate(across( -->
<!-- #     everything(),  -->
<!-- #     ~dplyr::first(.), -->
<!-- #     .names  = "first_{.col}" -->
<!-- #     ))  -->
<!-- #  -->
<!-- # # select columns for modeling -->
<!-- # model_df_first_filtered <- model_df_first %>%  -->
<!-- #   select( patID_eye, patID, SEXF, MT05_rate, starts_with("first")) %>%    -->
<!-- #   select(!matches("0[12346789]_rate")) %>% # exclude MT rates -->
<!-- #   select(!c("first_SEXF", "first_month", "first_patID")) %>%  -->
<!-- #   unique() -->

<!-- # make df of first visit phenotype values;  if first visit value @ phenotype is NA, grab first non-na, else, NA; exclude duplicated rows -->
<!-- first_values_df <- model_df %>%  -->
<!--   select(-patID, - SEXF) %>%  -->
<!--   arrange(patID_eye, month) %>%   -->
<!--   group_by(patID_eye) %>% -->
<!--   mutate( -->
<!--     across( -->
<!--         everything(),  -->
<!--         ~dplyr::first(.[!is.na(.)]), -->
<!--         .names = "first_{.col}" -->
<!--   )) %>% -->
<!--   ungroup() %>% -->
<!--   select(-matches("month"), -matches("MT05_rate")) %>%  -->
<!--   select(patID_eye,  starts_with("first_")) %>%  -->
<!--   unique() %>%  -->
<!--   arrange(patID_eye) -->

<!-- # filter out the firsts that don't make sense -->
<!-- model_df_first <- model_df %>%  -->
<!--   arrange(patID_eye) %>%  -->
<!--   select(patID_eye, patID, SEXF, MT05_rate) %>%  -->
<!--   na.omit() %>% -->
<!--   unique() %>%   -->
<!--   left_join(., first_values_df) -->




<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ### model each variable against MT5 correcting for SEXF, and random effect of patient dependence -->
<!-- > modeling rate by  patient's first phenotype does not have time effect, and therefore no repeated eye measures; but there are still repeated patients because each has two eyes -->

<!-- ```{r} -->


<!-- # exclude the response variable, mt5 rate -->
<!-- input_phenotypes <- names(model_df)[!names(model_df) %in% c("month","patID_eye", "patID", "SEXF", "MT05_rate")] -->

<!-- # formulas -->
<!-- form_strs <- paste0(response, " ~ ",input_phenotypes," + SEXF  + (1|patID)") -->

<!-- # for each variable in input_phenotypes, model FA_mean  -->
<!-- results_list <- mclapply(form_strs, function(form_str){ -->

<!--   ## linear model with random effects -->
<!--   re_formula <- as.formula(form_str) -->

<!--   fit <- try({lmer(formula = re_formula, data = model_df)}) -->

<!--   return(summary(fit)) -->

<!-- }, mc.cores = detectCores()-1) -->

<!-- names(results_list) <- sub("\\s\\+.*", "", form_strs) -->

<!-- # filter for models that worked -->
<!-- results_list <- results_list[unlist(lapply(results_list, function(x) !all(class(x) %in% c("summaryDefault", "table"))))] -->

<!-- ## make results df #### -->
<!-- results_df <- extract_results(results_list) -->

<!-- results_df <- results_df %>%  -->
<!--   filter(!Term %in% c("(Intercept)", "SEXF", "month")) -->

<!-- # filter for models that don't make sense -->
<!-- results_df_filtered <- results_df %>%  -->
<!--   filter(!Term   %in% grep("avg|MT0|_.*0\\d$|MICRON|SEX", results_df$Term, value = TRUE)) # exclude MT vars and zonal vars -->

<!-- # volcano plot of vaa~phenotypes result -->
<!-- MT5_rate_by_phenos_volcano <-ggplot(results_df, aes(x = Estimate, y = -log10(q_value), color = Model))+ -->
<!--       geom_point(show.legend = FALSE)+ -->
<!--       geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse( q_value <= .05,  Model, NA)), -->
<!--                        size = 4, -->
<!--                        nudge_y = 0.5, -->
<!--                        show.legend = FALSE, -->
<!--                        max.overlaps = 20)+ -->
<!--       geom_abline(slope = 0, intercept = -log10(.05), linetype = 2, color = "red")+ -->
<!--       geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "dashed")+ -->
<!--       theme_bw()+ -->
<!--       # facet_wrap(~quintile, scales = "fixed")+ -->
<!--       ggtitle("MT5_rate ~ SEXF + phenotype_i + (1| patID_eye) + (1|patID)") -->

<!-- ggsave(paste0(MT_modeling_path, "MT5_rate_by_phenos_volcano.png"), MT5_rate_by_phenos_volcano, width = 20, height = 12, dpi = 200) -->

<!-- MT5_rate_by_phenos_volcano_filtered<-ggplot(results_df_filtered, aes(x = Estimate, y = -log10(q_value), color = Model))+ -->
<!--       geom_point(show.legend = FALSE)+ -->
<!--       geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse( q_value <= .05,  Model, NA)), -->
<!--                        size = 4, -->
<!--                        nudge_y = 0.5, -->
<!--                        show.legend = FALSE, -->
<!--                        max.overlaps = 20)+ -->
<!--       geom_abline(slope = 0, intercept = -log10(.05), linetype = 2, color = "red")+ -->
<!--       geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "dashed")+ -->
<!--       theme_bw()+ -->
<!--       # facet_wrap(~quintile, scales = "fixed")+ -->
<!--       ggtitle("MT5_rate ~ SEXF + phenotype_i + (1| patID_eye) + (1|patID)") -->

<!-- ggsave(paste0(MT_modeling_path, "MT5_rate_by_phenos_volcano_filtered.png"), MT5_rate_by_phenos_volcano_filtered, width = 20, height = 12, dpi = 200) -->

<!-- MT5_rate_by_phenos_volcano_filtered_nominalP <-ggplot(results_df_filtered, aes(x = Estimate, y = -log10(`Pr(>|t|)`), color = Model))+ -->
<!--       geom_point(show.legend = FALSE)+ -->
<!--       geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse(`Pr(>|t|)`< .05,  Model, NA)), -->
<!--                        size = 4, -->
<!--                        nudge_y = 0.5, -->
<!--                        show.legend = FALSE, -->
<!--                        max.overlaps = 20)+ -->
<!--       geom_abline(slope = 0, intercept = -log10(.05), linetype = 2, color = "red")+ -->
<!--       geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "dashed")+ -->
<!--       theme_bw()+ -->
<!--       # facet_wrap(~quintile, scales = "fixed")+ -->
<!--       ggtitle("MT5_rate ~ SEXF + phenotype_i + (1| patID_eye) + (1|patID)") -->

<!-- ggsave(paste0(MT_modeling_path, "MT5_rate_by_phenos_volcano_filtered_nominalP.png"), MT5_rate_by_phenos_volcano_filtered_nominalP , width = 20, height = 12, dpi = 200) -->





<!-- ``` -->



# Parafovea

## Thickness

### shape data
```{r}

response = "parafovea"
# subset d with vars of interest
model_df <- d %>%
  select(month, patID_eye, patID, SEXF, all_of(c(phenotypes, response)))

# scale vars of interest, minus response: FA2_rate
model_df[, phenotypes[phenotypes!=response] ] <- scale(model_df[, phenotypes[phenotypes!=response] ])


```

### model each variable against parafovea rate, correcting for SEXF, and random effect of patient dependence
```{r}

# exclude the response variable, parafovea_rate
input_phenotypes <- setdiff( names(model_df), c("month","patID_eye", "patID", "SEXF",response))
  
# formulas
form_strs <- paste0(response, " ~ ",input_phenotypes," + SEXF  + (1|patID) +  (1|patID_eye)")

# for each variable in input_phenotypes, model FA_mean 
results_list <- mclapply(form_strs, function(form_str){
  ## linear model with random effects
  formula <- as.formula(form_str)

  fit <- try({lmer(formula = formula, data = model_df)})
  
  if(inherits(fit, "try-error")){
    return(NA)
  }else{
    return(summary(fit))
  }
}, mc.cores = detectCores()-1)

names(results_list) <- str_extract(form_strs, "\\S+\\s*~\\s*\\S+")

names(results_list)[is.na(results_list)]
# "OTHER_DISEASE" "SMKCIGSDAY"    "t2d"    

# filter for models that worked
results_list <- results_list[!is.na(results_list)]

## make results df ####
results_df <- extract_results(results_list)

results_df <- results_df %>% 
  filter(!grepl("(Intercept)|SEXF|month", Term))

# filter for models that don't make sense
results_df_filtered <- results_df %>% 
  filter(!Term   %in% grep("avg|MT0|_.*0\\d$|MICRON|FOVTHICK|SEX", results_df$Term, value = TRUE)) # exclude MT vars and zonal vars


# volcano plot of vaa~phenotypes result
parafovea_by_phenos_volcano <-ggplot(results_df, aes(x = Estimate, y = -log10(q_value), color = Term))+
      geom_point(show.legend = FALSE)+
      geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse( q_value <= .05,  Term, NA)),
                       size = 4,
                       nudge_y = 0.5,
                       show.legend = FALSE,
                       max.overlaps = 20)+
      geom_abline(slope = 0, intercept = -log10(.05), linetype = 2, color = "red")+
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "dashed")+
      theme_bw()+
      # facet_wrap(~quintile, scales = "fixed")+
      ggtitle("parafovea ~ SEXF + phenotype_i + (1| patID) + (1|patID_eye)")

ggsave(paste0(MT_modeling_path, "parafovea_by_phenos_volcano.png"), parafovea_by_phenos_volcano, width = 20, height = 12, dpi = 200)

# volcano plot of vaa~phenotypes result
parafovea_by_phenos_volcano_MT_filtered<- ggplot(results_df_filtered, aes(x = Estimate, y = -log10(q_value), color = Term))+
      geom_point(show.legend = FALSE)+
      geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse( q_value <= .05,  Term, NA)),
                       size = 4,
                       nudge_y = 0.5,
                       show.legend = FALSE,
                       max.overlaps = 20)+
      geom_abline(slope = 0, intercept = -log10(.05), linetype = 2, color = "red")+
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "dashed")+
      theme_bw()+
      # facet_wrap(~quintile, scales = "fixed")+
      ggtitle("parafovea ~ SEXF + phenotype_i + (1| patID) + (1|patID_eye)")

ggsave(paste0(MT_modeling_path, "parafovea_by_phenos_volcano_MT_filtered.png"), parafovea_by_phenos_volcano_MT_filtered, width = 20, height = 12, dpi = 200)

parafovea_by_phenos_volcano_MT_filtered_nominalP<- ggplot(results_df_filtered, aes(x = Estimate, y = -log10(`Pr(>|t|)`), color = Term))+
      geom_point(show.legend = FALSE)+
      geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse( `Pr(>|t|)` < .05,  Term, NA)),
                       size = 4,
                       # nudge_y = 0.5,
                       show.legend = FALSE,
                       max.overlaps = 20)+
      geom_abline(slope = 0, intercept = -log10(.05), linetype = 2, color = "red")+
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "dashed")+
      theme_bw()+
      # facet_wrap(~quintile, scales = "fixed")+
      ggtitle("parafovea ~ SEXF + phenotype_i + (1| patID) + (1|patID_eye)")


ggsave(paste0(MT_modeling_path, "parafovea_by_phenos_volcano_MT_filtered_nominalP.png"), parafovea_by_phenos_volcano_MT_filtered_nominalP,  width = h_w[2], height = h_w[1], dpi = 200)


# # add results to list
# parafovea_results_df_filtered <- results_df_MT_filtered
# poster_results_dfs[["parafovea_results_df_filtered"]] <- parafovea_results_df_filtered



```


## Rate
### Global rate
#### subset data to scale and model
* filter out the ones with (rows>0) < 30
```{r}


response = "parafovea_rate"
# subset d with vars of interest 
model_df <- d %>% 
  select(month, patID_eye, patID, SEXF, all_of(c(phenotypes, response)))

# scale vars of interest, minus response: FA2_rate
model_df[, phenotypes[phenotypes!=response] ] <- scale(model_df[, phenotypes[phenotypes!=response] ])


# make df of first visit phenotype values;  if first visit value @ phenotype is NA, grab first non-na, else, NA; exclude duplicated rows
first_values_df <- model_df %>% 
  select(-patID, - SEXF) %>% 
  arrange(patID_eye, month) %>%  
  group_by(patID_eye) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), 
        ~dplyr::first(.[!is.na(.)]),
        .names = "first_{.col}"
  )) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(-matches("month"), -matches("parafovea_rate")) %>% 
  select(patID_eye,  starts_with("first_")) %>% 
  unique() %>% 
  arrange(patID_eye)

# filter out the firsts that don't make sense
model_df_first <- model_df %>% 
  arrange(patID_eye) %>% 
  select(patID_eye, patID, SEXF, parafovea_rate) %>% 
  na.omit() %>%
  unique() %>%  
  left_join(., first_values_df)


```

#### model each variable against parafovea rate, correcting for SEXF, and random effect of patient dependence
> modeling rate by  patient's first phenotype does not have time effect, and therefore no repeated eye measures; but there are still repeated patients because each has two eyes

```{r}

# exclude the response variable, parafovea_rate
input_phenotypes <- setdiff( names(model_df_first), c("month","patID_eye", "patID", "SEXF",response))
  
# formulas
form_strs <- paste0(response, " ~ ",input_phenotypes," + SEXF  + (1|patID)")

# for each variable in input_phenotypes, model FA_mean 
results_list <- mclapply(form_strs, function(form_str){
  ## linear model with random effects
  formula <- as.formula(form_str)

  fit <- try({lmer(formula = formula, data = model_df_first)})
  
  if(inherits(fit, "try-error")){
    return(NA)
  }else{
    return(summary(fit))
  }
}, mc.cores = detectCores()-1)

names(results_list) <- str_extract(form_strs, "\\S+\\s*~\\s*\\S+")

names(results_list)[is.na(results_list)]
# "parafovea_rate ~ first_OTHER_DISEASE" "parafovea_rate ~ first_SMKCIGSDAY" "parafovea_rate ~ first_t2d"

# filter for models that worked
results_list <- results_list[!is.na(results_list)]

## make results df ####
results_df <- extract_results(results_list)

parafovea_global_results_df <- results_df

results_df <- results_df %>% 
  filter(!grepl("(Intercept)|SEXF|month", Term))

# filter for models that don't make sense
results_df_filtered <- results_df %>% 
  filter(!Term   %in% grep("avg|MT0|_.*0\\d$|MICRON|FOVTHICK|SEX", results_df$Term, value = TRUE)) # exclude MT vars and zonal vars


# volcano plot of vaa~phenotypes result
parafovea_rate_by_phenos_volcano <-ggplot(results_df, aes(x = Estimate, y = -log10(q_value), color = Term))+
      geom_point(show.legend = FALSE)+
      geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse( q_value <= .05,  Term, NA)),
                       size = 4,
                       nudge_y = 0.5,
                       show.legend = FALSE,
                       max.overlaps = 20)+
      geom_abline(slope = 0, intercept = -log10(.05), linetype = 2, color = "red")+
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "dashed")+
      theme_bw()+
      # facet_wrap(~quintile, scales = "fixed")+
      ggtitle("parafovea_rate ~ SEXF + phenotype_i + (1| patID)")

ggsave(paste0(MT_modeling_path, "parafovea_rate_by_phenos_volcano.png"), parafovea_rate_by_phenos_volcano, width = 20, height = 12, dpi = 200)

# # volcano plot of vaa~phenotypes result
# parafovea_rate_by_phenos_volcano_otherZones_filtered<- ggplot(results_df_otherZones_filtered, aes(x = Estimate, y = -log10(q_value), color = Term))+
#       geom_point(show.legend = FALSE)+
#       geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse( q_value <= .05,  Term, NA)),
#                        size = 4,
#                        nudge_y = 0.5,
#                        show.legend = FALSE,
#                        max.overlaps = 20)+
#       geom_abline(slope = 0, intercept = -log10(.05), linetype = 2, color = "red")+
#       geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "dashed")+
#       theme_bw()+
#       # facet_wrap(~quintile, scales = "fixed")+
#       ggtitle("parafovea_rate ~ SEXF + phenotype_i + (1| patID)")
# 
# ggsave(paste0(MT_modeling_path, "parafovea_rate_by_phenos_volcano_otherZones_filtered.png"), parafovea_rate_by_phenos_volcano_otherZones_filtered, width = 20, height = 12, dpi = 200)

# volcano plot of vaa~phenotypes result
parafovea_rate_by_phenos_volcano_MT_filtered<- ggplot(results_df_filtered, aes(x = Estimate, y = -log10(q_value), color = Term))+
      geom_point(show.legend = FALSE)+
      geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse( q_value <= .05,  Term, NA)),
                       size = 4,
                       nudge_y = 0.5,
                       show.legend = FALSE,
                       max.overlaps = 20)+
      geom_abline(slope = 0, intercept = -log10(.05), linetype = 2, color = "red")+
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "dashed")+
      theme_bw()+
      # facet_wrap(~quintile, scales = "fixed")+
      ggtitle("parafovea_rate ~ SEXF + phenotype_i + (1| patID)")

ggsave(paste0(MT_modeling_path, "parafovea_rate_by_phenos_volcano_MT_filtered.png"), parafovea_rate_by_phenos_volcano_MT_filtered, width = 20, height = 12, dpi = 200)

parafovea_rate_by_phenos_volcano_MT_filtered_nominalP<- ggplot(results_df_filtered, aes(x = Estimate, y = -log10(`Pr(>|t|)`), color = Term))+
      geom_point(show.legend = FALSE)+
      geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse( `Pr(>|t|)` < .05,  Term, NA)),
                       size = 4,
                       # nudge_y = 0.5,
                       show.legend = FALSE,
                       max.overlaps = 20)+
      geom_abline(slope = 0, intercept = -log10(.05), linetype = 2, color = "red")+
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "dashed")+
      theme_bw()+
      # facet_wrap(~quintile, scales = "fixed")+
      ggtitle("parafovea_rate ~ SEXF + phenotype_i + (1| patID)")

ggsave(paste0(MT_modeling_path, "parafovea_rate_by_phenos_volcano_MT_filtered_nominalP.png"), parafovea_rate_by_phenos_volcano_MT_filtered_nominalP,  width = h_w[2], height = h_w[1], dpi = 200)


# # add results to list
# parafovea_rate_results_df_filtered <- results_df_MT_filtered
# poster_results_dfs[["parafovea_rate_results_df_filtered"]] <- parafovea_rate_results_df_filtered



```

### step wise rate
#### subset data to scale and model
* filter out the ones with (rows>0) < 30
```{r}

var  = "parafovea"
# subset d with vars of interest 
model_df <- d %>% 
  select(month, patID_eye, patID, SEXF, all_of(c(phenotypes, var))) %>% 
  as.data.frame()

# scale vars of interest, minus var: FA2_rate
model_df[, phenotypes[phenotypes!=var] ] <- scale(model_df[, phenotypes[phenotypes !=var] ])



model_df_lag <- mclapply(unique(model_df$patID_eye), function(x) stepwise_rate(x, df = model_df,  var = var, time_var = "month"), mc.cores = detectCores()-1) %>% 
  do.call(rbind,.)

response = sprintf("%s_rate", var)


```

#### model each variable against parafovea rate, correcting for SEXF, and random effect of patient dependence
> modeling rate by  patient's first phenotype does not have time effect, and therefore no repeated eye measures; but there are still repeated patients because each has two eyes

```{r}

# exclude the response variable, parafovea_rate
input_phenotypes <- setdiff( names(model_df_lag), c("month","patID_eye", "patID", "SEXF",response, var, "year"))
  
# formulas
form_strs <- paste0(response, " ~ ",input_phenotypes," + SEXF  + (1|patID) + (1|patID_eye)")

# for each variable in input_phenotypes, model FA_mean 
results_list <- mclapply(form_strs, function(form_str){
  ## linear model with random effects
  formula <- as.formula(form_str)

  fit <- try({lmer(formula = formula, data = model_df_lag)})
  
  if(inherits(fit, "try-error")){
    return(NA)
  }else{
    return(summary(fit))
  }
}, mc.cores = detectCores()-1)

names(results_list) <- str_extract(form_strs, "\\S+\\s*~\\s*\\S+")

names(results_list)[is.na(results_list)]
# "parafovea_rate ~ first_OTHER_DISEASE" "parafovea_rate ~ first_SMKCIGSDAY" "parafovea_rate ~ first_t2d"

# filter for models that worked
results_list <- results_list[!is.na(results_list)]

## make results df ####
results_df <- extract_results(results_list)
parafovea_stepwise_results_df <- results_df

results_df <- results_df %>% 
  filter(!grepl("(Intercept)|SEXF|month", Term)) 

# filter for models that don't make sense
results_df_filtered <- results_df %>% 
  filter(!Term   %in% grep("avg|MT0|_.*0\\d$|MICRON|FOVTHICK|SEX", results_df$Term, value = TRUE)) # exclude MT vars and zonal vars


# volcano plot of vaa~phenotypes result
parafovea_rate_by_phenos_volcano <-ggplot(results_df, aes(x = Estimate, y = -log10(q_value), color = Term))+
      geom_point(show.legend = FALSE)+
      geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse( q_value <= .05,  Term, NA)),
                       size = 4,
                       nudge_y = 0.5,
                       show.legend = FALSE,
                       max.overlaps = 20)+
      geom_abline(slope = 0, intercept = -log10(.05), linetype = 2, color = "red")+
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "dashed")+
      theme_bw()+
      # facet_wrap(~quintile, scales = "fixed")+
      ggtitle("stepwise_parafovea_rate ~ SEXF + phenotype_i + (1| patID) + (1|patID_eye)")

ggsave(paste0(MT_modeling_path, "parafovea_stepwise_lag_rate_by_phenos_volcano.png"), parafovea_rate_by_phenos_volcano, width = 20, height = 12, dpi = 200)

# volcano plot of vaa~phenotypes result
parafovea_rate_by_phenos_volcano_MT_filtered<- ggplot(results_df_filtered, aes(x = Estimate, y = -log10(q_value), color = Term))+
      geom_point(show.legend = FALSE)+
      geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse( q_value <= .05,  Term, NA)),
                       size = 4,
                       nudge_y = 0.5,
                       show.legend = FALSE,
                       max.overlaps = 20)+
      geom_abline(slope = 0, intercept = -log10(.05), linetype = 2, color = "red")+
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "dashed")+
      theme_bw()+
      # facet_wrap(~quintile, scales = "fixed")+
      ggtitle("stepwise_parafovea_rate ~ SEXF + phenotype_i + (1| patID) + (1|patID_eye)")

ggsave(paste0(MT_modeling_path, "parafovea_stepwise_lag_rate_by_phenos_volcano_MT_filtered.png"), parafovea_rate_by_phenos_volcano_MT_filtered, width = 20, height = 12, dpi = 200)

parafovea_rate_by_phenos_volcano_MT_filtered_nominalP<- ggplot(results_df_filtered, aes(x = Estimate, y = -log10(`Pr(>|t|)`), color = Term))+
      geom_point(show.legend = FALSE)+
      geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse( `Pr(>|t|)` < .05,  Term, NA)),
                       size = 4,
                       # nudge_y = 0.5,
                       show.legend = FALSE,
                       max.overlaps = 20)+
      geom_abline(slope = 0, intercept = -log10(.05), linetype = 2, color = "red")+
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "dashed")+
      theme_bw()+
      # facet_wrap(~quintile, scales = "fixed")+
      ggtitle("stepwise_parafovea_rate ~ SEXF + phenotype_i + (1| patID) + (1|patID_eye)")

ggsave(paste0(MT_modeling_path, "parafovea_stepwise_lag_rate_by_phenos_volcano_MT_filtered_nominalP.png"), parafovea_rate_by_phenos_volcano_MT_filtered_nominalP,  width = h_w[2], height = h_w[1], dpi = 200)


# # add results to list
# parafovea_rate_results_df_filtered <- results_df_MT_filtered
# poster_results_dfs[["parafovea_rate_results_df_filtered"]] <- parafovea_rate_results_df_filtered



```



### compare global to stepwise
```{r}

fun <- function(x){
x %>% 
  mutate(Term = str_remove_all(Term, "first_")) %>% 
  select(Term, `Pr(>|t|)`) %>% 
  mutate(neglogP = -log10(`Pr(>|t|)`)) %>% 
  select(-`Pr(>|t|)`) %>% 
  filter(!grepl("Intercept|SEX", Term))
}

inner_join(fun(parafovea_global_results_df), fun(parafovea_stepwise_results_df <- results_df), by = "Term", suffix = c("_global", "_stepwise")) %>% 
  column_to_rownames("Term") %>% 
  mutate_all(~-log10(.)) %>% 
  plot()


abline(a = 0, b = 1)


```

#___   ________   _____   ______
# model slope

<!-- ## *slope  -->
<!-- ### subset data to scale and model -->
<!-- * filter out the ones with (rows>0) < 30 -->
<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- #  -->
<!-- # #  variables (rows of value>0) < 30 where MT_slope_sans3 present -->
<!-- # m <- d[!is.na(d$MT_slope_sans3),phenotypes] != 0 -->
<!-- #  -->
<!-- # vars <- m %>% -->
<!-- #   colSums(., na.rm = TRUE)  -->
<!-- #  -->
<!-- # # variables with > 30 obs of value>0  -->
<!-- # deviant_vars <- vars[vars > 30] %>% names() -->
<!-- #  -->
<!-- # # how many unique months do these have where FA_mean and var available? -->
<!-- # count_unq_months <-  sapply(deviant_vars, function(x){  -->
<!-- #                     # how many unique months where both mr and var available? -->
<!-- #                     return( d $month[!is.na(d$MT_slope_sans3) & !is.na(d[,x])] %>%  -->
<!-- #                              unique() %>% -->
<!-- #                              length() -->
<!-- #                             ) -->
<!-- #                   }) -->
<!-- # # vars with greater than one unique month observed  -->
<!-- # slope_greater_than_one_month <- count_unq_months[count_unq_months>1] %>%  -->
<!-- #   names() -->
<!-- #  -->
<!-- # # setdiff(deviant_vars ,greater_than_one_month  ) # "BLRPATTERN"  "NOABNORMFAF" only have 1 month of observations where >30 records of rows of value > 0 -->

<!-- response = "MT_slope_sans3" -->
<!-- # subset d with vars of interest  -->
<!-- model_df <- d %>%  -->
<!--   select(month, patID_eye, patID, SEXF, all_of(c(phenotypes, response))) -->

<!-- # scale vars of interest, minus response: FA2_rate -->
<!-- model_df[, phenotypes[phenotypes!=response] ] <- scale(model_df[, phenotypes[phenotypes!=response] ]) -->


<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ```{r} -->

<!-- # formulas -->

<!--   fit <- try({lmer(formula = re_formula, data = model_df)}) -->

<!--   return(summary(fit)) -->

<!-- }, mc.cores = detectCores()-1) -->

<!--   filter(!Term %in% c("(Intercept)", "SEXF", "month")) -->

<!--       geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse( q_value <= .05,  Term, NA)), -->
<!--                        size = 4, -->

<!--                        max.overlaps = 20)+ -->

<!--       theme_bw()+ -->
<!--       # facet_wrap(~quintile, scales = "fixed")+ -->

<!-- ggsave(paste0(MT_modeling_path, "MT_slope_sans3_by_phenos_volcano_filtered.png"), MT_slope_sans3_by_phenos_volcano_filtered, width = 20, height = 12, dpi = 200) -->





<!-- ``` -->


<!-- ## *slope rate  -->
<!--  ### subset data to scale and model -->
<!-- * filter out the ones with (rows>0) < 30 -->
<!-- ```{r} -->


<!-- # #  variables (rows of value!=0) < 30 where MT_slope_sans3_rate present -->
<!-- # m <- d[!is.na(d$MT_slope_sans3_rate) , phenotypes] != 0 -->
<!-- # vars <- m %>% -->
<!-- #   colSums(., na.rm = TRUE) -->
<!-- #  -->
<!-- # # variables with > 30 obs of value != 0 -->
<!-- # deviant_vars <- vars[vars > 30] %>% names() -->
<!-- #  -->
<!-- # # how many unique months do these have where FA_mean and var available? -->
<!-- # count_unq_months <-  sapply(deviant_vars, function(x){ -->
<!-- #                     # how many unique months where both mr and var available? -->
<!-- #                     return( d $month[!is.na(d$MT_slope_sans3_rate) & !is.na(d[,x])] %>% -->
<!-- #                              unique() %>% -->
<!-- #                              length() -->
<!-- #                             ) -->
<!-- #                   }) -->
<!-- # # vars with greater than one unique month observed -->
<!-- # slope_rate_greater_than_one_month <- count_unq_months[count_unq_months>1] %>% -->
<!-- #   names() -->


<!-- # # filter out vars that dont change where there is an fameanrate -->
<!-- # vars_dont_change <- phenotypes[ sapply(d[  !is.na(d$MT_slope_sans3_rate), phenotypes], n_distinct) <= 1] -->
<!-- #  -->
<!-- # # how many unique months do these have where MT_slope_sans3_rate and var available?  -->
<!-- # count_unq_months <- sapply(phenotypes, function(x){ -->
<!-- #    -->
<!-- #   num_months <- d$month[!is.na(d$MT_slope_sans3_rate) & !is.na(d[[x]]) ] %>%  -->
<!-- #       unique() %>%  -->
<!-- #       length() -->
<!-- #   return(num_months) -->
<!-- # }) -->
<!-- #  -->
<!-- # vars_few_month <- count_unq_months[count_unq_months<2] %>%  -->
<!-- #   names() -->
<!-- #  -->
<!-- # vars_dont_change_and_few_month <- c(vars_dont_change, vars_few_month) %>% unique() -->
<!-- #  -->
<!-- # slope_rate_greater_than_one_month <- c("MT_slope_sans3_rate", phenotypes[!phenotypes %in% vars_dont_change_and_few_month]) -->

<!-- response = "MT_slope_sans3_rate" -->
<!-- # subset d with vars of interest  -->
<!-- model_df <- d %>%  -->
<!--   select(month, patID_eye, patID, SEXF, all_of(c(phenotypes, response))) -->

<!-- # scale vars of interest, minus response: FA2_rate -->
<!-- model_df[, phenotypes[phenotypes!=response] ] <- scale(model_df[, phenotypes[phenotypes!=response] ]) -->


<!-- # make df of first visit phenotype values;  if first visit value @ phenotype is NA, grab first non-na, else, NA; exclude duplicated rows -->
<!-- first_values_df <- model_df %>%  -->
<!--   select(-patID, - SEXF,-MT_slope_sans3_rate ) %>%  -->
<!--   arrange(patID_eye , month) %>%   -->
<!--   group_by(patID_eye) %>% -->
<!--   mutate( -->
<!--     across( -->
<!--         everything(),  -->
<!--         ~dplyr::first(.[!is.na(.)]), -->
<!--         .names = "first_{.col}" -->

<!--   ungroup() %>% -->
<!--   select(-matches("month"), -matches("slope_rate")) %>%  -->
<!--   select(patID_eye,  starts_with("first_")) %>%  -->
<!--   unique() %>%  -->
<!--   arrange(patID_eye) -->

<!-- # join the first df to the model df -->
<!-- model_df_first <- model_df %>%  -->
<!--   arrange(patID_eye) %>%  -->
<!--   select(patID_eye, patID, SEXF, MT_slope_sans3_rate) %>%  -->
<!--   na.omit() %>% -->
<!--   unique() %>%   -->
<!--   left_join(., first_values_df) -->

<!-- # # scale model_df_first -->
<!-- # model_df_first <- model_df_first %>%  -->
<!-- #   mutate(across(-c( patID_eye, patID, SEXF) , ~as.vector(scale(.))) )    -->

<!-- # # filter out vars with sd na or 0 -->
<!-- # sds <- model_df_first %>%  -->
<!-- #   select(-c(patID_eye, patID, SEXF)) %>%  -->
<!-- #   sapply(., function(x)sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) %>% round) -->
<!-- #  -->
<!-- # # model df of ids and vars with sd not na or 0 -->
<!-- # model_df_first <- model_df_first %>%  -->
<!-- #   select(patID_eye, patID, SEXF, MT_slope_sans3_rate, all_of( names(sds[sds !=0 & !is.na(sds)]) )  ) -->


<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ### model each variable against slope rate, correcting for SEXF, and random effect of patient dependence -->
<!-- ```{r} -->

<!--   return(summary(fit)) -->

<!-- ## make results df #### -->

<!--   filter(!Term %in% c("(Intercept)", "SEXF", "month")) -->

<!-- # filter for models that don't make sense -->
<!-- results_df_filtered <- results_df %>%  -->

<!-- # Plotting ------- -->

<!-- # volcano plot of vaa~phenotypes result -->
<!-- MT_slope_sans3_rate_by_phenos_volcano <-ggplot(results_df, aes(x = Estimate, y = -log10(q_value), color = Model))+ -->
<!--       geom_point(show.legend = FALSE)+ -->
<!--       geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse( q_value <= .05,  Model, NA)), -->
<!--                        size = 4, -->
<!--                        nudge_y = 0.5, -->
<!--                        show.legend = FALSE, -->
<!--                        max.overlaps = 20)+ -->
<!--       geom_abline(slope = 0, intercept = -log10(.05), linetype = 2, color = "red")+ -->
<!--       geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "dashed")+ -->
<!--       theme_bw()+ -->
<!--       # facet_wrap(~quintile, scales = "fixed")+ -->
<!--       ggtitle("avg_slope rate(-3) ~ SEXF + phenotype_i + (1| patID)") -->

<!-- # ggsave(paste0(MT_modeling_path, "MT5_slope_rate_by_phenos_volcano.png"), MT5_slope_rate_by_phenos_volcano, width = 20, height = 12, dpi = 200) -->
<!-- #  -->
<!-- # # volcano plot of vaa~phenotypes result -->

<!-- #       geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse( q_value <= .05,  Model, NA)), -->
<!-- #                        size = 4, -->
<!-- #                        nudge_y = 0.5, -->
<!-- #                        show.legend = FALSE, -->
<!-- #                        max.overlaps = 20)+ -->
<!-- #       geom_abline(slope = 0, intercept = -log10(.05), linetype = 2, color = "red")+ -->

<!--       geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse( q_value <= .05,  Term, NA)), -->

<!-- ggsave(paste0(MT_modeling_path, "MT_slope_sans3_rate_by_phenos_volcano_MT_filtered.png"), MT_slope_sans3_rate_by_phenos_volcano_MT_filtered, width = 20, height = 12, dpi = 200) -->

<!-- MT_slope_sans3_rate_by_phenos_volcano_MT_filtered_nominalP<- ggplot(results_df_filtered, aes(x = Estimate, y = -log10(`Pr(>|t|)`), color = Term))+ -->
<!--       geom_point(show.legend = FALSE)+ -->
<!--       geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse( `Pr(>|t|)` < .05,  Term, NA)), -->
<!--                        size = 4, -->
<!--                        # nudge_y = 0.5, -->
<!--                        show.legend = FALSE, -->
<!--                        max.overlaps = 20)+ -->
<!--       geom_abline(slope = 0, intercept = -log10(.05), linetype = 2, color = "red")+ -->
<!--       geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "darkgrey", linetype = "dashed")+ -->
<!--       theme_bw()+ -->
<!--       # facet_wrap(~quintile, scales = "fixed")+ -->
<!--       ggtitle("avg_slope rate(-3) ~ SEXF + phenotype_i + (1| patID)") -->

<!-- ggsave(paste0(MT_modeling_path, "MT_slope_sans3_rate_by_phenos_volcano_MT_filtered_nominalP.png"), MT_slope_sans3_rate_by_phenos_volcano_MT_filtered_nominalP,width = h_w[2], height = h_w[1], dpi = 400) -->

<!-- #  -->
<!-- # # add results to list -->
<!-- # MT_slope_sans3_rate_results_df_filtered <- results_df_MT_filtered -->
<!-- # poster_results_dfs[["MT_slope_sans3_rate_results_df_filtered"]] <- MT_slope_sans3_rate_results_df_filtered -->



<!-- ``` -->

#________________________
# heatmap of structural  variables
```{r}

str_vars <- names(d)[sapply(d, function(x) is.numeric(x)|is.factor(x))] %>% 
  grep("eye|VAAM|month|DIAG|GRADER|msng|quint|pat|vis|SITE|SMK", .,value = TRUE, invert = TRUE)
  
setdiff(names(d), str_vars)

m <- d %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  select(all_of(str_vars)) %>%
  select(where(~ mean(is.na(.)) < 1)) %>% 
  # select(all_of(sub_str_vars)) %>% 
  mutate_all(~as.numeric(as.character(.))) %>% 
  as.matrix() %>% 
  scale()

cor_m <- cor(m, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

col_dend <- as.dendrogram(hclust(dist(cor_m), 
                                 method = "ward.D2"
                                 # method = "complete"
                                 ))
row_dend <- as.dendrogram(hclust(dist(cor_m^2),
                                 method = "ward.D2"
                                 # method = "complete"
                                 ))

hm <- Heatmap(cor_m, 
              column_title = "Feature correlations",
              na_col = "grey", 
              cluster_rows = TRUE,
              cluster_columns = TRUE,
              # cluster_rows = row_dend, 
              # cluster_columns = col_dend,
              # cluster_columns = row_dend,
              clustering_method_columns = "ward.D2",
              clustering_method_rows = "ward.D2",
              row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7),
              column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 7), 
              row_dend_width = unit(5, "cm"),
              column_dend_height = unit(5, "cm")
              )

png(paste0(wd_path, "results/modeling/str_vars_clustered_hm.png"), height = 2000, width = 2000)
draw(hm)
dev.off()

```

#____________________________
#|||||||||||||||||||||

# Save data
```{r}


saveHDF5SummarizedExperiment(sce, paste0(wd_path, "processed_data/sce003.h5"), replace = T)

notify.me("10_functionAndStructureModeling.Rmd Completed")
```

```{r}
check_dims()

# n_observations      12525
# n_patIDs_w_gr_1_vis   516
```
